case_title: ELSA CASILLA VS. CHRISTINA STOCKTON ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASILLA, ELSA AS TO DEFENDANT STOCKTON, CHRISTINA MASTERS, MARTIN DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-26-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-23-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-03-2017
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-26-2017 CONTINUED TO JUN-07-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-18-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-07-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100020975) EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-14-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
